A

addHospital(Hospital) - Method in class MapManager
Adds a hospital and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
addPatient(Patient) - Method in class MapManager
Adds a patient and triggers a full geometry and assignment recomputation.
addPatient(Patient) - Method in class VoronoiZone
Registers a patient as belonging to this zone.
addService(HospitalServiceType) - Method in class Hospital
Adds a medical service to the hospital.
addVertex(Coordinate) - Method in class VoronoiZone
Appends a vertex to the polygon and recomputes the surface area.
admitPatient() - Method in class Hospital
Attempts to admit a new patient.
AsciiMapRenderer - Class in Unnamed Package
Utility class responsible for rendering ASCII maps in the console.
AssignmentService - Class in Unnamed Package
Service class responsible for patient assignment.
AssignmentService() - Constructor for class AssignmentService
 

C

CARDIOLOGY - Enum constant in enum class HospitalServiceType
 
clearPatients() - Method in class MapManager
Removes all patients from the map and triggers a full recomputation.
CommandLineApp - Class in Unnamed Package
Command-line interface controller for the Emergency Dispatcher application.
CommandLineApp() - Constructor for class CommandLineApp
Initialises the application with an empty domain model and opens a scanner on the standard input stream.
compareTo(VoronoiZone) - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
computeSurface() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Computes the surface area using the shoelace formula and stores the result.
contains(Coordinate) - Method in class VoronoiZone
Tests whether a coordinate lies inside this zone using the ray-casting algorithm.
containsHospital(Hospital) - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Checks whether the triangle contains the position of a hospital.
Coordinate - Class in Unnamed Package
Business class representing a geographic coordinate.
Coordinate(double, double) - Constructor for class Coordinate
Creates a new coordinate.

D

Delaunay - Class in Unnamed Package
Algorithm class responsible for computing the Delaunay triangulation.
Delaunay() - Constructor for class Delaunay
Creates an empty Delaunay triangulation.
DelaunayTriangle - Class in Unnamed Package
Geometry class representing a triangle in the Delaunay triangulation.
DelaunayTriangle(Coordinate, Coordinate, Coordinate) - Constructor for class DelaunayTriangle
Creates a triangle from three coordinates.
distanceTo(Coordinate) - Method in class Coordinate
Computes the Euclidean distance between this coordinate and another coordinate.
distanceToCenter(Coordinate) - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns the Euclidean distance from the given coordinate to the zone centroid.
drawHospitalsAndDelaunay(List<Hospital>, List<DelaunayTriangle>, int, int) - Static method in class AsciiMapRenderer
Displays hospitals and the Delaunay triangulation in the console.
drawHospitalsAndVoronoi(List<Hospital>, List<VoronoiEdge>, int, int) - Static method in class AsciiMapRenderer
Displays hospitals and Voronoi edges in the console.
drawHospitalsPatientsAndDelaunay(List<Hospital>, List<Patient>, List<DelaunayTriangle>, int, int) - Static method in class AsciiMapRenderer
Displays hospitals, patients and the Delaunay triangulation in the console.
drawHospitalsPatientsAndVoronoi(List<Hospital>, List<Patient>, List<VoronoiEdge>, int, int) - Static method in class AsciiMapRenderer
Displays hospitals, patients and Voronoi edges in the console.

Compares this coordinate with another object.

equals(Object) - Method in class VoronoiEdge
Compares this Voronoi edge with another object.
equals(Object) - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
export() - Method in class Map
Persists this map to the storage medium via the injected FileSystem.

F

FileSystem - Interface in Unnamed Package
Abstraction layer for file-system operations on serialised maps.
findBestHospital(Patient, List<Hospital>) - Static method in class AssignmentService
Finds the most suitable hospital for a patient.
findHospitalByPosition(Coordinate) - Method in class MapManager
Finds a hospital by geographic position.

G

GENERAL - Enum constant in enum class HospitalServiceType
 
generateZones(List<Hospital>, List<Patient>, List<DelaunayTriangle>) - Method in class VoronoiService
Generates one VoronoiZone per hospital and populates each zone with the patients whose positions fall inside it.
getAssignedHospital(Patient) - Method in class MapManager
Returns the hospital currently assigned to the given patient.
getAverageDistanceToHospital() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns the average distance from patients in this zone to the hospital.
getCenter() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns the centroid as the arithmetic mean of the polygon vertices.
getCircumcenter() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Computes the circumcenter of the triangle.
getCreationDate() - Method in class Map
 
getCurrentCapacity() - Method in class Hospital
Returns the current occupancy level.
getDensity() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns the patient density (patients per surface unit).
getDistanceAB() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Computes the length of edge AB.
getDistanceBC() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Computes the length of edge BC.
getDistanceCA() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Computes the length of edge CA.
getEnd() - Method in class VoronoiEdge
Returns the ending coordinate of the edge.
getFileName() - Method in class Map
 
getFormat() - Method in class Map
 
getHospital() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getHospitals() - Method in class MapManager
Returns the hospital map indexed by identifier.
getId() - Method in class Hospital
Returns the hospital identifier.
getId() - Method in class Person
Returns the unique identifier of this person.
getId() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getLatitude() - Method in class Coordinate
Returns the latitude of the coordinate.
getLongitude() - Method in class Coordinate
Returns the longitude of the coordinate.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class Hospital
Returns the maximum capacity.
getMaxDistanceToHospital() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getMinDistanceToHospital() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getName() - Method in class Hospital
Returns the hospital name.
getName() - Method in class Person
Returns the display name of this person.
getPatientCount() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns the number of patients currently registered in this zone.
getPatients() - Method in class MapManager
Returns the patient map indexed by identifier.
getPatients() - Method in class VoronoiZone
Returns a defensive copy of the patient set to prevent external mutation.
getPatientsByService() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getPerimeter() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getPosition() - Method in class Hospital
Returns the hospital position.
getPosition() - Method in class Person
Returns the current geographic position of this person.
getRequiredService() - Method in class Patient
Returns the medical service required by the patient.
getSaturationRate() - Method in class Hospital
Computes the hospital saturation rate.
getServices() - Method in class Hospital
Returns a defensive copy of the service set.
getStart() - Method in class VoronoiEdge
Returns the starting coordinate of the edge.
getStdDevDistanceToHospital() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getSurface() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Computes the surface area of the triangle.
getSurface() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getTriangles() - Method in class Delaunay
Returns the current triangles of the triangulation.
getTriangles() - Method in class MapManager
Returns the most recently computed list of Delaunay triangles.
getVertices() - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Returns the three vertices of the triangle.
getVertices() - Method in class VoronoiZone
 
getVoronoiEdges() - Method in class MapManager
Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi edges.
getVoronoiEdges(List<DelaunayTriangle>) - Method in class VoronoiService
Produces one Voronoi edge for each pair of adjacent Delaunay triangles.
getVoronoiVertices(List<DelaunayTriangle>) - Method in class VoronoiService
Extracts one Voronoi vertex per Delaunay triangle by computing each circumcenter.
getZones() - Method in class MapManager
Returns the most recently computed list of Voronoi zones.

Generates a hash code consistent with the equals method.

hashCode() - Method in class VoronoiEdge
Generates a hash code consistent with equals().

Returns true if a hospital with the given identifier is registered.
hasPatient(String) - Method in class MapManager
Returns true if a patient with the given identifier is registered.
hasService(HospitalServiceType) - Method in class Hospital
Checks whether the hospital provides a specific service.

I

id - Variable in class Person
Unique identifier that distinguishes this person from all others in the system.
importing() - Method in class Map
Loads and returns the map stored at the file name via the injected FileSystem.
initializeAfterLoading() - Method in class MapManager
Reinitialises transient fields after deserialisation and rebuilds the geometry.
isInCircumcircle(Coordinate) - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Checks whether a coordinate lies inside the circumcircle of the triangle.
isSaturated() - Method in class Hospital
Checks whether the hospital has reached its maximum capacity.

Loads a previously saved map from a file.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Application entry point for command-line mode.

JVM entry point that hands control to the JavaFX runtime.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Console entry point of the Emergency Dispatcher application.

MainMenu - Class in Unnamed Package
JavaFX entry point and main menu of the Emergency Dispatcher graphical interface.
MainMenu() - Constructor for class MainMenu
 
Map - Class in Unnamed Package
Descriptor for a named, formatted map file managed by the persistence layer.
Map(String, String, FileSystem) - Constructor for class Map
Creates a new map descriptor and records the current instant as the creation time.
MapManager - Class in Unnamed Package
Central facade coordinating all domain objects of the Emergency Dispatcher.
MapManager() - Constructor for class MapManager
Creates an empty manager with all collections and services initialised.

Service class responsible for saving and loading application data.

MapView - Class in Unnamed Package
 
MapView() - Constructor for class MapView
 
moveHospital(String, Coordinate) - Method in class MapManager
Moves a hospital to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
movePatient(String, Coordinate) - Method in class MapManager
Moves a patient to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.

N

name - Variable in class Person
Human-readable display name shown in the graphical interface and console output.

P

Patient - Class in Unnamed Package
Business class representing a patient in the emergency dispatch system.
Patient(String, String, Coordinate, HospitalServiceType) - Constructor for class Patient
Creates a new patient.
PEDIATRICS - Enum constant in enum class HospitalServiceType
 
Person - Class in Unnamed Package
Abstract base class for all people tracked by the emergency dispatch system.
Person(String, String, Coordinate) - Constructor for class Person
Initialises the three attributes shared by all person subclasses.
position - Variable in class Person
Current geographic position of this person on the dispatch map.

R

read(String) - Method in interface FileSystem
Reads a map from the given file path.
recompute() - Method in class MapManager
Rebuilds all derived geometric structures and patient assignments from the current hospital and patient sets.
recomputeAssignments() - Method in class MapManager
Resets all hospital occupancy counters to zero and reassigns every patient to the best available hospital.
removeHospital(String) - Method in class MapManager
Removes a hospital by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.
removePatient(String) - Method in class MapManager
Removes a patient by identifier and triggers a full recomputation.
removeVertex(Coordinate) - Method in class VoronoiZone
Removes a vertex from the polygon and recomputes the surface area.

S

saveMap(MapManager, String) - Method in class MapPersistenceService
Saves the current map state into a file.
setOnPatientPlaced(Consumer<Patient>) - Method in class SimulationView
Registers a callback invoked each time a patient is created via this view.
sharesEdgeWith(DelaunayTriangle) - Method in class DelaunayTriangle
Checks whether this triangle shares an edge with another triangle.
show() - Method in class MapView
 
show() - Method in class SimulationView
Builds and displays the simulation window.
show(DelaunayTriangle, Map<Patient, Hospital>) - Method in class TriangleDetailView
Opens the triangle detail window.
show(Hospital, List<Patient>, VoronoiZone) - Method in class HospitalDetailView
 
show(VoronoiZone, List<VoronoiZone>) - Method in class ZoneDetailView
Opens the zone detail window.
SimulationView - Class in Unnamed Package
JavaFX view providing an interactive patient simulation panel.
SimulationView(List<Hospital>) - Constructor for class SimulationView
Creates a simulation view bound to the given list of hospitals.
start() - Method in class CommandLineApp
Starts the interactive menu loop and blocks until the user selects quit.
start(Stage) - Method in class MainMenu
Builds and shows the main menu window.

Returns a textual representation of the coordinate.

Returns a textual representation of the triangle.

Returns a textual representation of the patient.

triangulate(List<Hospital>) - Method in class Delaunay

U

updateCapacity(int) - Method in class Hospital
Updates the current occupancy level.
updatePosition(Coordinate) - Method in class Hospital
Updates the geographic position of the hospital.
updatePosition(Coordinate) - Method in class Person

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class HospitalServiceType
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class HospitalServiceType
Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
VoronoiEdge - Class in Unnamed Package
Geometry class representing an edge of the Voronoi diagram.
VoronoiEdge(Coordinate, Coordinate) - Constructor for class VoronoiEdge
Creates a new Voronoi edge.
VoronoiService - Class in Unnamed Package
Service class responsible for constructing the Voronoi diagram from a Delaunay triangulation.
VoronoiService() - Constructor for class VoronoiService
 
VoronoiZone - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents the geographic influence zone of a single hospital in the Voronoi diagram.
VoronoiZone(String, Hospital, List<Coordinate>) - Constructor for class VoronoiZone
Constructs a Voronoi zone and immediately computes its surface area.

W

write(Map, String) - Method in interface FileSystem
Writes a map to the given file path.

ZoneDetailView - Class in Unnamed Package
JavaFX view displaying statistical details about a selected Voronoi zone.
